ShortDescription.Value: In-game SVG drawing overlay for road, zone, and transit planning before you build.

Publish.LongDescription:
## Skyplan
Tracing paper over your city — inside CS2.
Open the overlay with **Alt+P** (rebindable), sketch out your road network, zoning, and transit lines on top of the live map, then build with confidence. Left-Click to start drawing Right-Click to end the drawing. for lines means left-click will end the drawing and start a new line from the end of the previous line. For Polygon means Left-click will add point and right click will end the drawing and close the Polygon.
### Disclaimer
This is a rough beta version, a lot of the feedback that i got on reddit is not yet implemented. even the Thumbnail is under development. There is no auto-save nor auto load. please export the plans before closing the game.
The second beta version (milestone) will include: v0.1.0 — Drawing Polish Make the drawing experience smoother and the overlay easier to use while building. - Per-layer opacity control - Global overlay opacity slider - Layer visibility toggle - Redo support - Fuzzy search for layers in the toolbar
### Features - Line, polygon, and point drawing tools: plan roads, mark zones, drop points of interest - 24 built-in layers: Transit (Train, Subway, Tram, Bus), Roads (Highway to Local), Zones (Residential, Commercial, Industrial, Office), Public Services, and Points of Interest — each with its own colour and style - Fully customisable layers: edit `layers.json` to add, remove, or restyle any layer. Changes hot-swap without a game restart - World-space coordinates: shapes stay pinned to the map as you pan and zoom - SVG export and import: save your plans as standard SVG files, open them in Inkscape, share them, or import them back later - Erase tool: with hover highlight - Undo: (Ctrl+Z) - Draggable toolbar
## Known Issues - changing the styles in `layer.json` while already having shapes in the current session wont hot reload. it needs clear-all for the new style to take effect.
## Limitations - No redo, only undo (Ctrl+Z) is supported. - No snapping, lines do not snap to roads, the grid, or other shapes. - Each line is a separate two-point segment, continuous polylines are planned but not yet implemented. - No layer visibility toggle, individual layers cannot be hidden without clearing them. - No labeling: there is no way to label the shapes and write custom text. Planned
### Usage
Load a city, press **Alt+P**, draw.
